description: Style NoteFunky boxers for the fashion conscious male, this pair from fcuk comes with a high definition waistband. So revel in style and the comfort of soft fabric. These super airy boxers help your body breathe freely, while you laze at home and looks great when teamed with tees.Product DetailsBlack and white printed boxer shorts that have a broad and stretchable waistband with branding, that sits snug and comfortably and has a button fly on the frontMaterial and CareMachine wash delicate inside out using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanFlat dry in shadeCool iron inside out if needed
